overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The scene transitions from neon-lit commercial streets with giant digital billboards, through a dark concrete overpass, past graffiti-covered walls, and finally across a busy intersection with heavy traffic and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with giant digital billboards

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in blue clothing along the wet red sidewalk past towering digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and shorts walking steadily ahead of the player character

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in bright red and white neon advertisements and video screens
dark building with large glowing blue and red Japanese character signage
mature trees planted along the sidewalk edge with green foliage
red tiled pedestrian walkway glistening with recent rain reflections
thick cylindrical column supporting the upcoming overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera following a pedestrian past massive digital billboards and neon signage. The wet red sidewalk reflects the vibrant red and blue lights from the surrounding buildings, while sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete overpass with minimal ambient lighting

events.description: character walks underneath a massive concrete overpass, dramatically reducing ambient light and blocking the neon skyline

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the dark overpass, maintaining pace with the pedestrian ahead in the dimly lit corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue clothing continuing forward under the overpass ahead of the player

entered.detail: massive dark concrete bridge deck overhead blocking the sky and ambient light
black metal safety barriers separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, sheltered space beneath a massive concrete overpass. The vibrant neon colors give way to shadowy grays and blacks, with only the distant street lights and vehicle headlights providing illumination. The character continues walking along the sidewalk bordered by metal railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with graffiti art and street debris

events.description: exits the dark overpass back into the neon-lit street, revealing a graffiti-covered wall on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing the colorful graffiti covering the right-hand wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants and dark jacket standing near the graffiti wall

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in vibrant blue and red spray-painted graffiti art and tags
red illuminated commercial signs hanging perpendicular to the street
steam rising from street-level vents creating atmospheric haze and light diffusion
discarded cardboard boxes and trash accumulated along the base of the graffiti wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the darkness of the overpass, the scene returns to the vibrant neon-lit environment. A long wall covered in colorful graffiti runs along the right side of the sidewalk, with cardboard debris scattered at its base. Steam rises from street vents ahead, and red neon signs become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street at the yellow crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at the yellow striped crosswalk while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection, passing behind the crossing pedestrian

entered.detail: broad diagonal yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with red lights illuminated for vehicle traffic
towering skyscrapers covered in bright green and pink neon advertisements and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a major intersection, with the character stepping onto a broad yellow-striped crosswalk. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the left while towering skyscrapers covered in massive neon displays dominate the view ahead. The scene is bustling with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in the heart of the cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from vibrant neon streets through a dark urban underpass and back into a bustling metropolitan hub. It begins on a wet red sidewalk reflecting brilliant blue and red lights from massive digital billboards as the camera follows a pedestrian forward. As the character moves ahead, the vibrant colors fade into shadowy grays and blacks while passing beneath the oppressive weight of a massive concrete overpass. The scene then emerges from the darkness into a corridor of colorful graffiti and rising steam, with red neon signs reappearing in the distance. Finally, the camera reaches a major intersection, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst heavy futuristic traffic and towering skyscrapers draped in glowing displays.
